title: Classify retryable boundary errors
scenario: Not every failure should be retried. Classification helpers let application code make decisions without string matching.
instructions: Implement is_retryable for CreateOrderUseCaseError. Only Repository(Unavailable) should return true.

hints.body: Add pub fn is_retryable(error: CreateOrderUseCaseError) -> bool.
Use matches! so only CreateOrderUseCaseError::Repository(RepositoryError::Unavailable) returns true.
One complete solution for Classify retryable boundary errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: is_retryable now classifies retry decisions from typed errors instead of relying on strings or status codes.
